action.command: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const filePath = '/workspace/repo/src/index.js'; try { const data = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8'); const newData = 'function count() {\\n    let counter = 0;\\n    return counter++;\\n}'; fs.writeFileSync(filePath, newData); console.log('Content replaced successfully.'); } catch (err) { console.error('Error reading or writing file:', err); }"
